name: JellyfinLimiter
overview: Limits the number of simultaneous streams per user with global defaults.
description: A Jellyfin plugin to limit simultaneous streams with global default and per-user overrides. Features include customizable messages and automatic session management.

versions.changelog:
- Added DefaultMaxStreams configuration (global default limit) 
- Limiter now falls back to default when no per-user override 
- Settings UI updated with default field and smarter overrides 
- API GetUserStreamLimit returns effective value and source

- Updated controller 
- Fixed iOS error 
- Fixed configuration management 
- Add TRY in cancel session
